rows.label: Project Software, IT Services, and Support
sourceNotes: This set is rebuilt from locally curated proxy values. It is not a live scrape of the listed external pages.
External URLs in this set are manual reference links from the sourcing pass and may become stale.
Technology pack blends sold-business averages for IT/software services, all technology, graphic/web design, and websites/e-commerce.
This is still a proxy for Nigeria owner mode and should be replaced over time with Nigeria-native service tech observations.
These are still external small-business transaction proxies and should be replaced over time with Nigeria-native Afrexit observations.
rows.recommendation: Restored to EBITDA-led market multiples because the prior revenue-multiple override was based on a broad proxy pack and produced misleading early outputs for high-margin IT-support cases.

rows.label: Primary Agriculture and Raw Supply
sourceNotes: This set is rebuilt from locally curated proxy values. It is not a live scrape of the listed external pages.
External URLs in this set are manual reference links from the sourcing pass and may become stale.
Agriculture page reports sold-business revenue and earnings multiple quartiles for the last five years.
These are still external small-business transaction proxies and should be replaced over time with Nigeria-native Afrexit observations.
rows.recommendation: Review whether the calibration has become too revenue-led for a business model that base policy treats as earnings-sensitive.

rows.label: Agro-processing
sourceNotes: This set is rebuilt from locally curated proxy values. It is not a live scrape of the listed external pages.
External URLs in this set are manual reference links from the sourcing pass and may become stale.
Anchored to sold-business averages on the manufacturing benchmarks page, including Food Products and overall Manufacturing.
Upper bounds remain constrained to the same published manufacturing-page context rather than public-company multiples.
These are still external small-business transaction proxies and should be replaced over time with Nigeria-native Afrexit observations.
rows.recommendation: Review whether revenue should really replace EBITDA as the primary market basis here, especially if the benchmark set is a proxy blend rather than a tight sector dataset.
